title: Chef Aid Pastry Cutters, Set Of 3, Cookie Biscuit Cutter, Scone, Mince Pie, Tarts, Mini Quiches, Dough, At Home Baking, Cake Decorating, Fondant Icing, Round Circle Crinkled Stainless Steel Cutters
features: SET OF 3 : The Chef Aid crinkled cutters come in 3 different sizes; Includes a 6.5cm cutter, a 5.5cm cutter and a 4.5cm cutter
HOME BAKING : The round crinckled cutter are a must in all kitchens for home baking; Perfect for cutting pastry, dough, cookies, biscuits and fondant icing
CRINKLE CUT DESIGN : Traditional waved, crickle design; Precise cutting edge for a neater, cleaner cut
STAINLESS STEEL : Made from quality stainless steel; Hand wash recommended to prolong the life of the cutters and keep them in prestine condition
CHEF AID : Chef Aid offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home that are affordable without compromising on quality
description: From the manufacturer Chef Aid is the brand from the manufacturer George East housewares and offers an extensive range of products for the kitchen and home without compromising on quality Practical and functional, every product is designed for easy use and comfort Tin Plate Metal Cutters The Chef Aid Pastry Cutter features traditional tin plated design, they are made of high quality metal. Each set includes 3 sizes Pastry Cutters in circle shapes with crinkle cut edges measuring from 4.5cm, 5.5cm and 6.5cm. They are perfect for using with all types of pastry, Biscuit mix and Cookie Dough and Fondant Icing. These cutters can be cleaned in a dishwasher but we suggest handwashing and drying to preserve these items in pristine condition
